sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 134:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 134:1
items.html: Because of the manifestation of illumination of GAR in the vessel of Hochma. As the Gadlut illuminated to the Hesed, so it extended the ZON of Bina to it, and united with them into one Partzuf. Then Bina was refined from phase two to phase one in order to be face-to-face with the vessel of Hesed, and placed the light Hesed there.
